## Menzerna M5 Super-Finish Compound

Menzerna M5 is a very fine, versatile super-finish premium solid polishing compound. It is particularly suitable for polishing hard precious metals such as white gold, silver, rhodium-plated gold, titanium, hard multimetal alloys, stainless steel and hard high-gloss lacquers. It provides a brilliant, deep-gloss surface.

## Product Features

- Super finish polishing compound for hard precious metals, stainless steel, titanium and lacquer
- Weight: 1.300 g
- Grease content: dry
- Application together with buffing discs made of soft cotton / flannel

## Protective Equipment when Polishing

When grinding and polishing, the work equipment used creates considerable health risks. It is therefore compulsory to wear suitable personal protective equipment for work safety when grinding and polishing. In particular, all rotating polishing and brushing tools may only be operated with suitable covers for reasons of occupational safety.

### Wear eye / face protection
The fine dust emanating from polishing is harmful to the eyes. Flying parts can cause serious injuries to the face and eyes.
Safety Image: https://eickelit.com/media/wysiwyg/Safety/Gesichtsschutz_benutzen_klein.jpg

### Wear respiratory protection
Fine dust contaminated with heavy metals and respirable, which can only be retained with suitable respiratory protection, is produced during polishing.
Safety Image: https://eickelit.com/media/wysiwyg/Safety/Atemschutz_benutzen_klein.jpg

### Wear protective clothing
Flying parts can cause sensitive injuries all over the body.
Safety Image: https://eickelit.com/media/wysiwyg/Safety/Schutzkleidung_benutzen_klein.jpg

### Wear gloves
In general, gloves should be worn when grinding and polishing. If there is a risk of being wound up (e.g. drills, processing small parts, etc.), gloves may be prohibited on the basis of a risk assessment.
Safety Image: https://eickelit.com/media/wysiwyg/Safety/Handschutz_benutzen_klein.jpg

### Wear ear protection
Due to the noise exposure during grinding and polishing, it is necessary to wear suitable hearing protection on a regular basis.
Safety Image: https://eickelit.com/media/wysiwyg/Safety/Geh_rschutz_benutzen_klein.jpg

## Details according to Regulation (EU) 2023/988 (GPSR)

## Menzerna Polishing Paste M5 for Stainless Steel, Precious Metals and Lacquer

The Menzerna Polishing Paste M5 is a premium polishing compound specifically designed to deliver exceptional results on stainless steel, precious metals, and lacquer surfaces. With its unique formula, this paste produces a mirror-high gloss finish of the highest brilliance, making it an ideal choice for professionals and enthusiasts alike.

### Key Features

- High-gloss polishing compound for stainless steel, precious metals, and lacquer
- Produces absolute deep gloss on painted surfaces
- For processing with soft cotton polishing wheels

### Technical Specifications

- Product Weight: 0.500 kg
- Application: Stainless steel, precious metals, and lacquer
- Polishing Method: Soft cotton polishing wheels

### Additional Information

The Menzerna Polishing Paste M5 is a versatile tool that can be used to achieve showroom-quality finishes on a variety of surfaces. Its unique formula and soft cotton polishing wheel compatibility make it an excellent choice for professionals and hobbyists looking to enhance their metalworking skills.

#### Benefits

- Exceptional gloss retention and durability
- Easy application and removal
- Improved surface finish and appearance

## The finest polishing minerals create an unmatched mirror finish without visible micro scratches.

M5 is the finest solid polishing compound produced by Menzerna – this specialty product is designed for use on precious metals like gold, platinum, and titanium, but can also produces unmatched buff-trail free results on stainless steel, aluminum, and other non-ferrous metals.

Quick Overview:
M5 Super Finishing Paste Compound Menzerna polishing compounds are specially formulated to help jewellers achieve that professional quality finish. Menzerna M5 White is a super fine finishing compound with a dry grease content, developed with premium polishing minerals to produce an exceptional mirror gloss finish. Safe to use and easy to clean up.

## Description

Menzerna polishing compounds are specially formulated to help jewellers achieve that professional quality finish. Menzerna M5 White is a super fine finishing compound with a dry grease content, developed with premium polishing minerals to produce an exceptional mirror gloss finish. Safe to use and easy to clean up, this polishing compound is suitable for use with paint, stainless steel, and precious metals.
